predicates.name: is_surviving_legally_cohabiting_partner_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving legally cohabiting partner of the second (predeceased) person.

predicates.name: is_descendant_of
predicates.description: The first person is a descendant of the second person.

predicates.name: foregoing_provisions_apply
predicates.description: The foregoing provisions apply to the surviving legally cohabiting partner (first arg) with respect to the predeceased legally cohabiting partner (second arg).

predicates.name: exclusion_from_foregoing_provisions_applies
predicates.description: The exclusion from the foregoing provisions applies because the surviving legally cohabiting partner (first arg) is a descendant of the predeceased legally cohabiting partner (second arg).
